_crons_note: Every cron here spends Upstash Redis commands, and the quota is a hard
monthly cap — exhausting it takes down anything Redis-backed, including
/api/google-auth (i.e. nobody can log in). The previous schedule ran ~1,584
invocations/day against a ~16,700 command/day budget and blew the cap on
2026-07-19. Dev crons were dropped entirely (sync Dev by hand when needed)
and the rest were slowed to fit. Before adding or speeding up a cron, work
out the daily command cost first.
